state_model: 2-window edge state E = (r1, pi0, r2, pi1)
interpretation: Fixed-lambda psi-only LP feasible at K=8. This demonstrates a positivity-aware descent certificate exists in the 2-window edge-state abstraction with lambda = log_2(3) - 1 + rho. NOT yet a Collatz proof; we still need: (a) exact rational re-verification of every constraint, (b) closing the abstraction gap via realized-trajectory verification, and (c) extending K to scale beyond 8.
